news.title: OpenAI Prepares to File for an I.P.O. in Coming Weeks
news.snippet: OpenAI would be one of the most highly anticipated potential initial public offerings, in what is set to be a major year of I.P.O.s for Silicon Valley.

news.title: Nvidia’s Profit Hits $58.3 Billion as A.I. Boom Gathers More Steam
news.snippet: The chip maker said its profit in its most recent quarter jumped 211 percent from a year earlier thanks to extreme demand from other big technology companies.

news.title: Soundtrack to 8,000 Job Cuts: A Meta Worker’s Layoff-Themed A.I. Songs
news.snippet: On a dark day of layoffs at Meta, one employee responded by creating an internal radio station that plays songs about job cuts — generated by artificial intelligence, of course.

news.title: Meta Lays Off 8,000 Employees, as A.I. Casualties Mount
news.snippet: Employees have signed petitions against being tracked by A.I. and were trying to figure out who had been let go on Wednesday, as the Silicon Valley giant tries to transform into an A.I.-first company.

news.title: How Google Is Starting to Win the A.I. Race
news.snippet: Despite its early stumbles, Google’s Gemini has leapfrogged ChatGPT in relevance and usefulness. Soon, it will be ubiquitous.

news.title: As OpenAI Celebrates Court Win Against Musk, Other Challenges Lie Ahead
news.snippet: A jury’s rejection of Elon Musk’s $150 billion lawsuit against OpenAI was a major hurdle crossed. But the maker of ChatGPT faces a list of other problems.

news.title: Bipartisan Bill Would Impose New Annual Fee on Electric Vehicles
news.snippet: A House transportation bill introduced this week would require owners of electric cars to pay $130 to cover the cost of road repairs.

news.title: After Elon Musk’s Court Loss Comes the Long Hot A.I. Summer
news.snippet: Even as protests increase, the collapse of Mr. Musk’s suit against OpenAI and Sam Altman will speed up the artificial intelligence juggernaut.

news.title: Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
news.snippet: A nine-member jury found that Mr. Musk had waited too long to sue. The setback for the tech mogul frees OpenAI to continue in the artificial intelligence race.

news.title: Five Takeaways From the Blockbuster Trial Pitting Elon Musk Against OpenAI
news.snippet: It took a jury less than two hours to decide that Mr. Musk had waited too long to sue. But the testimony over three weeks was still illuminating.

news.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
news.snippet: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

news.title: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
news.snippet: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

news.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
news.snippet: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

news.title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
news.snippet: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

news.title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
news.snippet: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.

news.title: Elon Musk has lost yet another legal battle. Why he'll still keep fighting
news.snippet: Musk has lost his high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, but is not likely to change his aggressive style.

news.title: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
news.snippet: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.

news.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue
news.snippet: Jurors spent weeks hearing about Musk's claim that Altman had "stolen a charity."

news.title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
news.snippet: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.

news.title: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
news.snippet: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.

news.title: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: We talk to an expert about the risks from AI hackers

news.title: SpaceX Listed Grok’s ‘Spicy’ Mode as a Risk in Its IPO Filing
news.snippet: The rocket company has set aside more than $500 million for potential litigation losses, in part to account for complaints alleging that Grok created sexualized images.

news.title: SpaceX Is Spending $2.8 Billion to Buy Gas Turbines for Its AI Data Centers
news.snippet: The investment comes as Elon Musk’s AI unit faces complaints about the carbon-emitting units and looks to become a big player in cloud computing.

news.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Anthropic Is Paying $15 Billion a Year to Access Its Data Centers
news.snippet: The long-awaited documents SpaceX filed with US regulators Wednesday included details about a lucrative deal to lend GPUs to a major AI rival.

news.title: I Gave My OpenClaw Agent a Physical Body
news.snippet: The coding skills of AI models are about to make it much easier to build and deploy robots.

news.title: A New York Cop Got Injured at a Boxing Match. Now Madison Square Garden Is Banning His Lawyer
news.snippet: Attorney John Scola is representing a police officer who is suing over injuries allegedly sustained while working security at an MSG property in 2025.

news.title: It’s Officially Election Season in Trumpworld
news.snippet: With Trump nemesis Thomas Massie vanquished, Republican strategists are now eyeing races in Texas, California, and Maine.

news.title: ‘Perfect Storm’: How Trump’s Aid Cuts Are Fueling the Ebola Outbreak
news.snippet: One health provider who works on the ground says that basic medical equipment like masks and hand sanitizers are in short supply due to funding cuts.

news.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
news.snippet: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

news.title: The SpaceX IPO filing is filled with AI bets, Starship dreams, and Elon Musk at the center
news.snippet: SpaceX has finally made the contents of its IPO filing public, weeks ahead of what is expected to be the largest IPO ever and one that will make Musk the CEO, CTO, and chairman of the board.

news.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
news.snippet: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

news.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
news.snippet: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

news.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
news.snippet: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

news.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
news.snippet: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

news.title: Sam Altman makes ‘mic drop’ offer to every Y Combinator startup
news.snippet: Altman offered to have OpenAI invest in every single startup in this Y Combinator class: tokens for equity.

news.title: You don’t need to be an AI startup to raise. Lucra has $20M to prove it.

news.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
news.snippet: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

news.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
news.snippet: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

news.title: 第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京顺利举办！近20位行业大咖解码Agent与非共识机遇
news.snippet:
今日，由量子位主办的第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京启幕。
  2026年，AI产业一路高歌猛进。从“龙虾”到“Harness”，爆款Agent接连出圈、风靡全网。面对层出不穷的新业态与新玩法，不少从业者和普通用户都感到困惑：如何找准AI的使用方式？怎样把握产业机遇？又该如何跟上行业发展的步伐？

news.title: 长鑫科技更新招股书，碧桂园错失300亿
news.snippet:
地产行业内，曾有望跑出两家明星创投企业，一家是世纪金源，另一家是碧桂园。前者现在做得顺风顺水，收获一个又一个IPO，而碧桂园因为地产业务暴雷，需要大量资金保交楼，被迫中断了在科技领域的投资“大爆发”。
  01

news.title: 要做数字劳动力生产工厂，「未来式智能」完成Pre-A轮融资
news.snippet:
文｜王欣逸
  编辑｜邓咏仪
  36氪获悉，未来式智能（AutoAgents.ai）近日完成Pre-A轮融资，新进投资方包括凡创资本、中关村资本、探元资本，老股东东证创新、麟阁创投跟投，本轮融资主要用于算力投入、团队扩张以及新产品的生态建设运营。
  未来式智能成立于2023年6月

news.title: 早期项目 | Chance AI获美图等数百万美元投资，用户数已达20万
news.snippet:
作者丨欧雪
  编辑丨袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，Visual Agent（视觉智能体）创业公司Chance AI宣布完成数百万美元天使轮融资。本轮由美图领投，NYX Ventures、阿里系投资机构等跟投。融资将用于模型能力迭代、北美学生群体增长、以及社区与商业化探索。
  Chance AI成立于2025年，核心产品是全球第一款以摄像头为主要交互入口的

news.title: 全球首部95分钟AI长片将在戛纳电影节首映，由Seedance 2.0制作
news.snippet: 法国当地时间5月19日，字节跳动旗下火山引擎携Seedance 2.0亮相第79届戛纳电影节。多家国际级企业现场披露了与Seedance 2.0的合作进展，顶尖视觉特效公司Outpost VFX、全球广告传播集团WPP，以及欧洲领先的AIGC平台Magnific等，均已将Seedance 2.0接入其日常内容生产工作流。电影节期间，Seedance 2.0参与制作的8部AI影片也

news.title: 拆解有道“子曰4”全量开源：如何通过重构思维链打下落地成本？
news.snippet: 近日，网易有道宣布“子曰”大模型迎来 4.0 版本的全方位升级。“子曰4" 正式迈入全模态时代，不仅全面支持文本、图片、音频的融合交互，有道更宣布将核心的“多模态模型”与“语音合成（TTS）模型”正式开源。与此同时，翻译模型也迎来了深度的技术重构，翻译质量与效率实现双重提升。多模态模型视觉与数理斩获SOTA，纯文本数理难题性能行业领先据介绍，开源的“子曰4”多模态模型在 27B 参

news.title: 国产GPU进军AIPC：铠大师与摩尔线程达成生态共建合作
news.snippet: 2026年5月18日，摩尔线程在北京发布“云-边-端”全栈智算矩阵，从夸娥智算集群，到MTT AICUBE、AIBOOK、MT Lambda和MUSA生态，展示了国产GPU企业从云端算力走向家庭、边缘和具身智能的完整布局。其中最值得关注的是摩尔线程首款AI电脑的发布，国内全功能GPU领军企业摩尔线程与应用生态融合AI服务领航者晟为数科正式宣布达成深度战略合作，双方将以软硬件协同

news.title: 2026 字节跳动奖学金启动！首次开放全球申请，奖励名额增加
news.snippet: 5月20日消息，2026“字节跳动奖学金”正式启动申请。该奖学金面向前沿科技领域的高校在校生，为每位获奖学生及导师提供高达30万元人民币的现金奖励。项目今年首次将申请范围扩大至全球高校，同时获奖名额也将突破去年的20位。

news.title: 2026上半年最大IPO：Cerebras 上市，撕开美股「五大AI阵营」权力裂缝
阿里云面向Agentic时代全面升级，重磅发布全新“芯-云-模型-推理”技术体系
news.snippet: 5月20日，阿里云在峰会上宣布完成"芯片-云-模型-推理"全栈Agent化升级，同步推出全新AI产品官网"千问云"、搭载自研AI芯片真武M890的超节点服务器，以及最新旗舰模型Qwen3.7-Max。这是国内云厂商首次围绕Agent进行全栈产品发布。阿里云资深副总裁刘伟光表示， Agent突破临界点之后可以24小时不间断工作，对AI和云的

news.title: 贝塔无限连续完成种子轮、种子+轮数亿元融资，以系统工程重构消费级具身智能
news.snippet: 近日，据雷峰网了解，聚焦消费级通用具身智能的先锋企业 贝塔无限 Beta Infinity 宣布，公司已先后完成种子轮、种子+轮数亿元融资。种子轮由洪泰基金、正景基金、银杏谷资本、水木清华校友种子基金、粤科金融等知名投资机构联合投资，种子+轮由世纪华通参与的盛趣泰和基金与和利资本联合领投，毅达资本、南山战新投等知名机构跟投，义柏资本担任财务顾问。两轮资金将主要用于核心技术研发、产品试制等。<

news.title: iPhone 11 以来首次：ACSI 报告三星超苹果成 2026 美国手机满意度最高厂商
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 21 日消息，美国顾客满意度指数（ACSI）基于 26963 份调查问卷，指出苹果客户满意度在 2026 年降至 80%，低于三星的 81%，是自 iPhone 11（2019 年 9 月发布）时期后首次失去榜首位置。ACSI 本周公布《2026 年电信、手机与智能手表研究</

news.title: 1555 元：绿联推出雷电 5 硬盘盒扩展坞，10 合一设计
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 21 日消息，绿联今天推出雷电 5 硬盘盒扩展坞，新品采用 10 合一设计，具备 DP 视频接口，售价 1555 元。

news.title: 刚拿下 400 亿美元 Anthropic 大单，马斯克称 SpaceX 正洽谈向其他公司提供 AI 计算服务
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 21 日消息，马斯克当地时间 5 月 20 日发文称，SpaceX 正向 Anthropic 公司提供大规模人工智能 AI 计算服务，并正在与其他公司洽谈提供类似服务。马斯克表示，随着时间推移，尤其是随着在轨数据中心的建设，预计将以极高规模为 AI 提供服务。
